title: sterculia attenuata
intro: Sterculia attenuata, also known as the Java sterculia or Java cotton tree, is a plant species native to Southeast Asia, specifically in Indonesia and Malaysia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries, with its roots and bark being rich in medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Sterculia attenuata include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating digestive issues, such as diarrhea and dysentery. The herbal preparation of the plant is typically made into a decoction or infusion, with the roots and bark being used to create a medicinal tea that can be consumed to reap its health benefits.
